title: Toilet Paper 60 Rolls, 3 Ply Toilet Rolls Bulk Buy, Luxuriously Soft, Gentle and Hypoallergenic Sustainable Toilet Rolls - Quilted Toilet Roll for Your Family - Dermatologically Tested (60)
features: Softesse Toilet Paper 3 ply toilet paper made with virgin cellulose for the highest quality, absorbency, strength and softness. 170 sheets per roll

Luxuriously Soft & Strong: Because it is 3ply and made from virgin cellulose, quilted toilet roll is both very strong and incredibly soft, offering a silky-smooth feel that provides exceptional comfort, delivering a luxurious experience
Carefully designed: to be soft and gentle, these luxuriously quilted 3-ply toilet tissues offer exceptional comfort.
Hypoallergenic: Loo roll is hypoallergenic & free from harsh chemicals and fragrances that can cause discomfort or irritation. Makes it a great choice for people with sensitive skin or allergies

The Perfect Pack: This convenient bulk pack of 60 (12 x 5) toilet rolls ensures your essentials are always well-stocked. Ideal for both home use with your family and for businesses, including offices, restaurants, hotels, and schools—easy to store and ready to use whenever needed.

Sustainable: Toilet paper roll is made from responsibly sourced materials and is certified by FSC. Also thanks to its quality, it minimises your usage while reducing the environmental impact. FSC-Certified & Environmentally Responsible. By choosing Softesse, you are making an eco-friendly choice that helps protect forests and promotes responsible production.
description: Product Description Quilted Design Soft, cushiony texture for extra comfort and absorbency. 3 Ply Toilet Rolls Three layers for added strength, softness, and durability. Safe To Flush Designed to break down easily, preventing pipe blockages. FSC Certified Made from responsibly sourced materials. How many sheets are there per roll of Softesse toilet paper? A Softesse toilet roll contains 170 sheets per roll. What is the number of products per box? A Softesse toilet roll box contains 60 products. Is Softesse toilet paper flushable? Yes, Softesse toilet paper is designed to be flushable and can dissolve quickly in water How soft and absorbent is this tissue? Thanks to its 3 ply, it's very strength, soft, and durable.
